meaning: n.(用大蒜、酒或醋作配料的)咖喱肉
examples: A new study has found that people who like stimulating their taste buds with meals such as a vindaloo curry also have risk-taking personalities.
Ordering a chicken vindaloo is usually the sign of someone who has taste for very spicy food. It is also turns out to be an indication that their personality is also on the spicy side.
The restaurant serves up a number of popular favourites including madras, vindaloo and jalfrezi, as well as a fiery dish called 'Naga' made with the infamous world's hottest naga chilli pepper.
The four pups, which had been fed with herring, were given the names Mango Chutney, Vindaloo, Kashmir and Halleem by staff.
Norwegians may find it harder to get meat and potatoes on a Sunday, but there will be no shortage of vindaloo.
